overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk lined with palm trees and power lines during golden hour. The scene transitions from following a character in a red jacket to a character in dark clothing who emerges from behind cover, continuing down the street toward a futuristic cityscape with digital billboards and distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and utility poles

agents.ego_description: following a character in a bright red jacket walking steadily down the sidewalk away from the camera

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket walking away from camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street casting long shadows
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and power lines
dilapidated single-story buildings with corrugated metal roofs and graffiti
tall futuristic cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertising screens
large metal dumpsters and trash bins along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street during golden hour, following a character in a red jacket walking away from the camera. Tall palm trees and utility poles line the sidewalk, with low-rise dilapidated buildings on the left and a multi-lane road with sparse traffic on the right. In the distance, a futuristic digital billboard tower and skyscrapers are visible against the bright sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with scattered debris and street furniture

events.description: character in dark clothing stands up from crouching position behind dumpster and begins walking forward
passing by concrete benches and accumulated trash bags on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character in dark clothing and glasses walking down the sidewalk toward the setting sun, passing urban debris and street furniture

notable_agents.action: futuristic cars and trucks driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: concrete benches placed along the sidewalk for seating
piles of blue and black garbage bags accumulated on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a character in dark clothing who stands up from behind a dumpster and continues walking down the sidewalk. The character passes concrete benches and piles of trash bags on the left while futuristic vehicles drive by on the right. The digital billboard tower becomes more prominent on the right side as the sun sets directly ahead, casting long shadows and creating a warm, hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit urban sidewalk that transitions from following one figure to another as it pushes deeper into a futuristic cityscape. It begins by trailing a character in a red jacket walking past tall palm trees and dilapidated buildings under the glow of a golden hour sunset. As the perspective shifts, the camera moves past a dumpster to follow a character in dark clothing who emerges and continues down the street. The scene then expands to reveal concrete benches and piles of trash bags on the left while futuristic vehicles glide by on the right. Finally, the view opens up toward a prominent digital billboard tower and distant skyscrapers as the sun sets directly ahead, casting long shadows across the hazy, warm atmosphere.
